content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Mike Baker and Ted Prim  
Date: Sept. 20, 1977

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Gina

Subject:

As per advice from opinion request meeting participants, I called Marion Ash of the Secretary of State's office and informed her Section 89001 does not prohibit legislators from contributing ballot arguments appearing in the ballot pamphlet sent to all voters. I also told her this advice will be included with other requests from her office concerning March Fong's "love letter" which accompanies the voter pamphlet.

RSK:bw
